_about: Approximate per-city climate normals used as static priors for region-aware severity. monthly_mean_c is indexed 0=January..11=December (degrees C). daily_stddev_c is a coarse day-to-day spread around the monthly mean and encodes that continental Ottawa swings harder than maritime Vancouver. These are reference priors, not measurements; the hybrid baseline prefers stored history when enough exists (see analyze.py / events.py).
source: Rounded long-term monthly mean temperatures (Environment Canada 1981-2010 normals, approximate).
